message.content:
Based on your search for verses about courage when facing fear, here are a few from the results that focus specifically on finding strength through trusting God despite being afraid:

*   **Psalms 56:3** states: "What time I am afraid, I will trust in thee."
*   **Deuteronomy 1:29** reminds us to say: "Dread not, neither be afraid of them."

Would you like me to look up the full text of any other verses that appeared in this search?

results.text: Therefore am I troubled at his presence: when I consider, I am afraid of him.
Thou, [even] thou, [art] to be feared: and who may stand in thy sight when once thou art angry?
Withdraw thine hand far from me: and let not thy dread make me afraid.
Then I said unto you, Dread not, neither be afraid of them.
What time I am afraid, I will trust in thee.
